tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, tumor type [primary or recurrent], sample type [tumor or normal] and body site where samples were obtained from participants with pleuropulmonary blastoma and involved in the "Genomic Sequencing of Pleuropulmonary blastoma" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

variables.name: TISSUE SITE
variables.description: General body site where sample was collected

tables.description: Subject ID, gender, age, and primary disease of participants with pleuropulmonary blastoma and involved in the "Genomic Sequencing of Pleuropulmonary blastoma" project.

variables.name: Primary Disease
variables.description: The main disease(s) for which the participant has been asked to donate a sample for study

tables.description: Sample ID, subject ID, and sample use variables obtained from participants with pleuropulmonary blastoma and involved in the "Genomic Sequencing of Pleuropulmonary blastoma" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Seq_DNA_SNP_MAF_Ind: Sample(s) were used to generate aggregate mutation annotation file (.maf) with individual SNP genotypes; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID and consent group of participants with pleuropulmonary blastoma and involved in the "Genomic Sequencing of Pleuropulmonary blastoma" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC
